name: Stack Control
description: Arrange controls vertically or horizontally with configurable spacing

content.title: Stack Control
content.content:
# Stack Control

## Purpose

The Stack control arranges child controls in a vertical or horizontal layout with configurable spacing and alignment.

## Basic Usage

### Example 1: Vertical Stack (Default)

```csharp --render StackExample1 --show-code
Controls.Stack
    .WithArea(Controls.Html("Hello"))
    .WithArea(Controls.Html("World"))
```

**What you see above**:
- A `StackControl` with vertical orientation (default)
- Two HTML controls stacked vertically
- "Hello" appears above "World"

### Example 2: Horizontal Stack

```csharp --render StackExample2 --show-code
Controls.Stack
    .WithOrientation(Orientation.Horizontal)
    .WithArea(Controls.Button("Save"))
    .WithArea(Controls.Button("Cancel"))
```

**What you see above**:
- A `StackControl` with horizontal orientation
- Two buttons arranged side-by-side
- Buttons appear in left-to-right order

### Example 3: Stack with Spacing

```csharp --render StackExample3 --show-code
Controls.Stack
    .WithVerticalGap("20px")
    .WithArea(Controls.Label("Item 1"))
    .WithArea(Controls.Label("Item 2"))
    .WithArea(Controls.Label("Item 3"))
```

**What you see above**:
- Three labels stacked vertically
- 20 pixels of space between each label
- Clean, evenly-spaced layout

## Adding Child Controls

### WithView Method

**Signature**:
```csharp
.WithView(control, areaName)
```

**Purpose**: Adds a control with a specific area name.

**Example**:
```csharp
Controls.Stack
    .WithView(Controls.CheckBox(true), "checkbox1")
    .WithView(Controls.CheckBox(false), "checkbox2");
```

### WithArea Method

**Signature**:
```csharp
.WithArea(control)
```

**Purpose**: Adds a control with auto-generated area name.

**Example**:
```csharp
Controls.Stack
    .WithArea(Controls.Button("OK"))
    .WithArea(Controls.Button("Cancel"));
```

## Orientation Options

| Orientation | Behavior |
|-------------|----------|
| `Orientation.Vertical` | Stacks controls top to bottom (default) |
| `Orientation.Horizontal` | Arranges controls left to right |

**Example**:
```csharp
.WithOrientation(Orientation.Horizontal)
```

## Spacing Configuration

| Method | Purpose | Example |
|--------|---------|----------|
| `WithVerticalGap(gap)` | Space between items in vertical stack | `"16px"`, `"1rem"` |
| `WithHorizontalGap(gap)` | Space between items in horizontal stack | `"8px"`, `"0.5rem"` |

**Example**:
```csharp
Controls.Stack
    .WithOrientation(Orientation.Horizontal)
    .WithHorizontalGap("12px")
    .WithArea(Controls.Button("First"))
    .WithArea(Controls.Button("Second"));
```

Result: Two buttons side-by-side with 12 pixels between them.

## Alignment

| Method | Purpose | Values |
|--------|---------|--------|
| `WithHorizontalAlignment(align)` | Horizontal alignment of items | `"start"`, `"center"`, `"end"` |
| `WithVerticalAlignment(align)` | Vertical alignment of items | `"start"`, `"center"`, `"end"` |

**Example**:
```csharp
Controls.Stack
    .WithHorizontalAlignment("center")
    .WithArea(Controls.Button("Centered"));
```

Result: Button is horizontally centered within the stack.

## Size Configuration

| Method | Purpose |
|--------|----------|
| `WithWidth(width)` | Sets stack width |
| `WithHeight(height)` | Sets stack height |
| `WithWrap(wrap)` | Enables wrapping when items overflow |

**Example**:
```csharp
Controls.Stack
    .WithWidth("300px")
    .WithHeight("200px")
    .WithArea(Controls.Label("Constrained"));
```

## Common Patterns

### Form Buttons

```csharp --render StackFormButtons --show-code
Controls.Stack
    .WithOrientation(Orientation.Horizontal)
    .WithHorizontalGap("8px")
    .WithHorizontalAlignment("end")
    .WithArea(Controls.Button("Cancel"))
    .WithArea(Controls.Button("Save"))
```

Right-aligned horizontal button group.

### Toolbar

```csharp --render StackToolbar --show-code
Controls.Stack
    .WithOrientation(Orientation.Horizontal)
    .WithHorizontalGap("4px")
    .WithArea(Controls.Button("New"))
    .WithArea(Controls.Button("Open"))
    .WithArea(Controls.Button("Save"))
```

Horizontal toolbar with tightly-spaced buttons.

### Vertical Form

```csharp --render StackVerticalForm --show-code
Controls.Stack
    .WithVerticalGap("16px")
    .WithArea(Controls.Text("Name"))
    .WithArea(Controls.Text("Email"))
    .WithArea(Controls.Button("Submit"))
```

Vertical form with consistent spacing.

## Nesting Stacks

Stacks can contain other stacks:

```csharp --render StackNested --show-code
var innerStack = Controls.Stack
    .WithOrientation(Orientation.Horizontal)
    .WithArea(Controls.Button("A"))
    .WithArea(Controls.Button("B"));

Controls.Stack
    .WithVerticalGap("20px")
    .WithArea(Controls.Label("Title"))
    .WithArea(innerStack)
    .WithArea(Controls.Label("Footer"))
```

Shows nested horizontal stack within vertical stack.

## See Also
